gates.description: IR document carries the expected schema tag
diagnostics.entity_count == len(entities) == independent summary count (when present)
run folder contains the expected artifacts (cadctl inspect OR patch run)
extraction operated on a staged copy, never the read-only original

gates.detail: operated on staged copy under staging/

gates.description: wired baseline ops present and implemented in operations.v2.json
run folder captured stdout/stderr evidence for the external command
diff parses and conforms to cad_diff.v1 (structural if jsonschema absent)

gates.detail: no diff supplied; cad_diff schema gate skipped

gates.description: diff records >=1 created/modified/deleted (a patch that produced NO diff is NOT a success)

gates.description: modified/deleted handles fall within the patch's declared expectation when a patch is given (else informational)

gates.detail: not a patch run; original-unchanged gate skipped

gates.description: IR coverage flags do not claim 'implemented' for a section the IR never emitted, nor assert an entity count the entities[] cannot back (no-fake-success; present-but-empty is honest)
